children.textContent: Affects your usual bus to dentist

children.name: p
children.textContent: City Council expands mixed-use zoning in North Brooklyn

children.name: p
children.textContent: Buildings on Bedford Ave between N 1st and N 9th St can now add 2–4 floors. Expect construction noise by Q3. Property assessments may rise 8–15% within the zone.
